style_name: telephone-signal-pop within dreamy atmospheric anime with luminous space palette
song_motif: a forced smile reflected as a split ambient expression

color_rules.base: deep indigo and midnight space backgrounds
color_rules.shadow_color: dark sapphire and deep indigo shadow
color_rules.secondary_light: subtle soft rose shimmer secondary glow
color_rules.highlight: cool pearl and icy white highlights
color_rules.rule: limited-color anime palette: electric blue dominant, dark shadows, near-black backgrounds, subtle soft rose shimmer secondary glow, cool pearl and icy white highlights
